# konnect_access_role (Resource)

AccessRole Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_access_role" "my_accessrole" {
  provider = konnect-beta
  cp_id = "bf138ba2-c9b1-4229-b268-04d9d8a6410b"
  labels = {
    key = "value"
  }
  name = "...my_name..."
  rules = [
    {
      access = [
        {
          str = "...my_str..."
        }
      ]
      mesh = "...my_mesh..."
      names = [
        "..."
      ]
      types = [
        "..."
      ]
      when = [
        {
          destinations = {
            match = {
              key = "value"
            }
          }
          dp_token = {
            tags = [
              {
                name  = "...my_name..."
                value = "...my_value..."
              }
            ]
          }
          from = {
            target_ref = {
              kind = "...my_kind..."
              mesh = "...my_mesh..."
              name = "...my_name..."
              tags = {
                key = "value"
              }
            }
          }
          selectors = {
            match = {
              key = "value"
            }
          }
          sources = {
            match = {
              key = "value"
            }
          }
          target_ref = {
            kind = "...my_kind..."
            mesh = "...my_mesh..."
            name = "...my_name..."
            tags = {
              key = "value"
            }
          }
          to = {
            target_ref = {
              kind = "...my_kind..."
              mesh = "...my_mesh..."
              name = "...my_name..."
              tags = {
                key = "value"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
  type = "...my_type..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cp_id` (String) Id of the Konnect resource. Requires replacement if changed.
- `name` (String) name of the AccessRole
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `labels` (Map of String)
- `rules` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

### Read-Only

- `warnings` (List of String) warnings is a list of warning messages to return to the requesting Kuma API clients.
Warning messages describe a problem the client making the API request should correct or be aware of.

- `types` (List of String)
- `when` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--when))

Optional:

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_access_role.my_konnect_access_role
  id = jsonencode({
    cp_id = "bf138ba2-c9b1-4229-b268-04d9d8a6410b"
    name = "..."
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_access_role.my_konnect_access_role '{"cp_id": "bf138ba2-c9b1-4229-b268-04d9d8a6410b", "name": "..."}'
```
